goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'autumn house'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'thursday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should depart from 'bishops stortford' and should 'leave after 12:15'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'train ID', and 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
